Based on the information we found, both SunSet Rent-A-Car and Speedy Rentals offer electric car rentals in Los Angeles. 

SunSet Rent-A-Car has a rating of 4.5 and offers Sedan, SUV, and Convertible cars. The price for a week-long rental is $315.00.

Speedy Rentals also has a rating of 4.5 and offers Sedan and Convertible cars. The price for a week-long rental is $336.00.
